agent_output: Done — the helper is at `scripts/agent-health-check.js` and prints `agent health ok` on success. It's a lightweight CJS script matching the style of the other helpers in `scripts/`, so you can call it directly with `node` or as a curl-style health probe endpoint in tooling.
